description: Gamified engagement mechanics offering prizes and surprises to encourage audience participation through interactive swipe/tap actions.
structural_recipe: Create an interactive game mechanic (swipe, tap, scratch, spin) that users perform to reveal prizes or surprises. Pair with clear call-to-action in Arabic instructing users to play and win. Include branded hashtags and mention prize value prominently. Frame as exclusive opportunity with tangible rewards.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to gamification that combines entertainment with material incentives. Interactive mechanics increase session time and shareability. The element of surprise and winning triggers dopamine-driven engagement, especially in F&B where samples and discounts are strong motivators.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure compliance with Saudi gambling and promotional regulations—games of chance may face restrictions
Prize claims and delivery must be transparent and legally compliant
Avoid mechanics that could be perceived as deceptive or manipulative
